title: T2SCH361 ARCHIVED — New Brunswick Tax on Large Corporations - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED — T2SCH361 New Brunswick Tax on Large Corporations
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
A schedule for large corporations with a permanent establishment in New Brunswick to calculate their taxable capital and tax on large corporations.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available. Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2006 – Fillable PDF (t2sch361-fill-06e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available.
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2006 – Fillable PDF (t2sch361-fill-06e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available. Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2006 – Standard print PDF (t2sch361-06e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t2sch361-02e.pdf) 1999 – Standard print PDF (t2sch361-99e.pdf) 1998 – Standard print PDF (t2sch361-98e.pdf)

- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
